name: core-health-watch
prompt: Call system_health_get with detail_level=full. The MCP may start the registered Windows Core task once when Core is unavailable. Return [SILENT] only when health.status is ok, ready.status is PASS, and data_quality is PASS. Otherwise report a concise Chinese alert with the failed checks. Never call a transaction or other write tool.
note: Enable only after Hermes Gateway delivery and the target Cron schema are verified.
